---
title: "Research Interests"
---

<!-- ## Research Interests -->
- Engineering Design
- AI for Design and Manufacturing
- Computational Design

<!-- Summarize your main research areas here.

- Area one
- Area two
- Area three

## Current Projects

### Project Title

Add a short description of the problem, your approach, and its significance.

### Another Project

Use this section for active collaborations, dissertation work, or lab projects.

## Methods

List the methods, tools, or datasets you work with most often. -->
